title: Resolution Respectfully Requesting and Urging the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Provide Additional Manpower in Vaccination Site and Contact Tracing Team in the Municipal Health Office to Further Improve the Services for Our Constituents Amid Covid-19 Pandemic. ( AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Miko C. Pelegrina, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Rodora P. Loares, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozylyn N. Manan
